raw.advertiser_name: オンクレはトレバ - オンラインクレーンゲーム
raw.message: ✨🎉Try Now for FREE! Install the Toreba App and Get at least 10 Plays! Get figures, plushies and more! 🎁🎁

hook.summary: A pink cat mascot dances in a massive warehouse filled with claw machines.
hook.visual_action: A person in a pink cat costume dances as the camera zooms out to reveal rows of claw machines in a large warehouse.
hook.text_overlay: Play Claw Machine Toreba Win real Japanese prizes!
hook.voiceover_transcript: Play claw machine Toreba. Win real Japanese prizes.

scene_flow: Introduction of the Toreba warehouse with a dancing mascot and prize promise.
Promotion of free plays for new users with a gift box animation.
Demonstration of a beginner-friendly claw machine gameplay and assist feature.
Explanation of free shipping from Japan via an animated sequence with a plane.
Final call to action screen with the game logo and play button.
on_screen_text: New players can try for free!...
Beginner friendly starter machines and assist available!
audience_proxy: Fans of Japanese culture and casual gamers who enjoy the thrill of winning physical prizes from claw machines.
